name: Breeze Sigh
description: Gentle wind breathing through tall grass

prompts.label: gentle wind breathing through tall meadow grass
prompts.text: gentle wind breathing through tall meadow grass, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.label: soft breeze sighing through wheat field with slow rhythm
prompts.text: soft breeze sighing through wheat field with slow rhythm, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: air moving lazily through wildflower stalks
prompts.text: air moving lazily through wildflower stalks, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.label: prairie wind exhaling with patient seasonal cadence
prompts.text: prairie wind exhaling with patient seasonal cadence, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay

prompts.label: hillside grass bending in slow hypnotic waves of sound
